headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://*.firebaseapp.com https://*.googleapis.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://unpkg.com; worker-src 'self' blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.googleusercontent.com https://*.firebase.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseio.com wss://*.firebaseio.com; frame-src 'self' https://*.firebaseapp.com;
